programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 1
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 12
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan - EP 1
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood has never been to Japan. As far as he's concerned, it's a land without bread - and a land without bread, is a land without bakers. This three-part series sees Britain's favourite baker discover just how wrong he was - and how Japan is fast becoming one of the world's top foodie destinations. Across the series, Paul travels the country sampling regional delicacies and gets taught some of Japan's most famous dishes.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Clynn by Nature Hair Regrowth Bundle
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ascen resources ITOH Sugabloc
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs. 来自日本井藤汉方的日常控糖配方，结合4大天然草本成分，帮助减缓糖分吸收，稳定餐后血糖。让血糖不再忽高忽低，减少饭后疲倦，同时有助体重管理和心血管健康。让你在享受美食的同时，也能更安心地管理血糖。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q'Sai Knee Supporter Collagen and Glucosamine
programme.desc: A premium joint formula with 4g dose of collagen peptides per serving combines Hyaluronic Acid and Chondroitin to lubricate and cushion joints. NAG, a more advanced form of glucosamine. As a direct building block for Hyaluronic Acid, NAG helps cartilage retain water, reduces inflammation. Consuming Both products together creates a powerful synergistic effect for joint repair. 一款优质的关节养护配方，每份含有 4克高剂量胶原蛋白肽，并融合了玻尿酸与软骨素，旨在为关节提供润滑与缓冲保护。 含更先进的 N-乙酰葡萄糖胺（NAG）。NAG 能帮助软骨锁住水分，并具有缓解关节炎症的作用。 同时服用 Q’SAI 这组护膝黄金搭档，能够产生强效的协同作用，全方位加速关节的修复与保养。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: The American West in the mid-1800's – a land beyond the reach of the law. A ruthless gang plunders the plains, murdering innocent Indian women and children to collect their scalps. One man stands in their way, a warrior hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Order of Death
programme.desc: A pair of corrupt cops spend their illegal cash on an uptown New York City apartment.

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: Bruce Lee, The Legend
programme.desc: The official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Order of Death
programme.desc: A pair of corrupt cops spend their illegal cash on an uptown New York City apartment.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Luar Biasa
programme.desc: Kisah yang diinspirasikan daripada pemenang pingat emas Paralimpik, Mohamad Ridzuan yang menghadapi penyakit 'Cebral Palsy' dan abangnya yang sentiasa ada di sisinya.

programme.title: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Big Bad Car - EP104
programme.desc: Klaus's claim of being the fastest car in the world is put to the test.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Sports - EP119
programme.desc: In this episode, we will travel through the wonderful world of sports. We will learn the physical and mental benefits of practising a sport or physical activity. We will talk about the value of perseverance, training, and the importance of knowing how to win and how to lose. We will learn about different sports and disciplines and how to show respect to our opponents.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Mellodees - Monster Mash - EP14
programme.desc: Trick-or-Treat! Grab your costume and don't forget your dancing shoes for Dee's Halloween smash.

programme.desc: A furniture restorer, Ah Lim, cares for his Alzheimer's-stricken wife, Monica, and refuses to replace their marital bed with a "Smart hospital bed," causing tension with his son Ah Min. Years later, Ah Min, now bedridden and lonely, calls customer service agent Joanne. He keeps insisting that she call him by Ah Min, like how his parents used to address him. He strives for a human connection and reminisces about his parents' loving relationship.

Haojian finally realises the man Leia is having an affair with is Yurou's husband, Lucas.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 11 至死不渝
programme.desc: Andrew strikes at Keying with a suitcase, David protects her. David recalls their first meeting, and he seems to be hiding a secret. Eve reveals that Andrew already had a family and that he and Ron had conspired to film her secretly. When Ron backed out, Andrew killed him. Victor confesses his feelings to Keying, but she rejects him, leaving Victor stunned

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 75 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 19 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Xiao Cheng has not attended the Harbour Orchestra's rehearsals for three days. Cheng Qing tries both persuasion and pressure to convince him to return, but their playful scuffle is witnessed by Cheng Lang. Cheng Lang mistakenly believes they are dating and secretly keeps an eye on Xiao Cheng.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 259

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: Bruce Lee, The Legend
programme.desc: The official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Cry Of The Penguins
programme.desc: Rejected by a young woman (Hayley Mills) in London, a scientist (John Hurt) retreats to Antarctica to study the penguin

programme.title: The Black Panther
programme.desc: A gung-ho ex-military man pursues a secret life of crime, culminating in the kidnapping of a teenage heiress.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Bibik Aku Nak Kahwin
programme.desc: Milah yang terlalu berharap untuk berkahwin, akhirnya menemui jodoh secara tiba-tiba. Lakonan Didie Alias, Hairul Azreen dan Nabila AF.

programme.title: Baby-Sita
programme.desc: Two grand-theft-auto and best friends Adam & Hatim discovered a baby at the back seat of a stolen car. Keen to avoid detection, they take care of the baby while figuring out how to return the baby without getting caught

programme.title: Baby Jarum
programme.desc: Mami Jarum is back! and this time Mami is making sure her grand-daughter Asyikin will marry the man of her choosing, however Asyikin has a better plan (or worse!) for herself.

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Challenge Accepted
programme.desc: Jeff seorang tiktokers terkenal. Jeff telah berjaya membuat seoarang gadis,Fatimah jatuh cinta padanya tetapi akhirnya Fatimah mendapat tahu yang Jeff hanya menggunakannya demi populariti.

programme.title: Diari Chinta
programme.desc: Chinta selalu gagal dalam cintanya diberikan sebuah diari ajaib untuk menulis babak cinta. Impian yang ditulis Chinta itu menjadi kenyataan dengan kemunculan Ben namun tidaklah selancar yang disangka.

programme.title: Kipas Belum Mati
programme.desc: Mia, seorang artis meningkat naik, membuka kelab peminatnya dan dibantu oleh Lynn yang menjadi pengurus. Dengan bantuan Lynn, kelabnya maju namun ada harga yang harus dibayar di sebalik kejayaan tersebut..

programme.title: Geng
programme.desc: Isabella is an ex-convict who has sworn off her life of crime. Unfortunately, her old gang boss wants her to do one last drug transaction and kidnaps her mother to blackmail Isabella. With the help of her high school best friends, Mariam and Anita, Isabella goes on a road trip to save her mother.

programme.title: Keabadian Cinta
programme.desc: 3 couples falls in love with each other in 3 different love stories.

programme.title: Boyfriend Aku Dari ...
programme.desc: After being disappointed multiple times, Risya is introduced by a friend to Andy, a nerdy young man. They fall in love but in actuality, Andy is a boyfriend from 'hell'!

programme.title: Gengster Leng Chai
programme.desc: Black is a failure of a gangster, being too soft hearted with people. After meeting Mawar, he is determined to change despite the objections of others.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Sesat Kat Paris
programme.desc: Nini and Haikal start their big adventure to find their aunty Lisa who gets a job offer as a professional photographer in Paris. Unfortunately, their journey turns upside down when they arrive in Paris and ruin a newly-wed coupleís honeymoon.

programme.title: Nota Silam
programme.desc: Munirah menjumpai sebuah nota cinta di dalam sebuah buku yang diperolehi secara rambang dari 'blind date with a book' dan cuba untuk menemukan pasangan di dalam nota tersebut yang merubah hidup Munirah

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Football Nation - OFC - EP7
programme.desc: The Oceania Football Confederation is the smallest and least know of the FIFA federations.

programme.title: Football Nation - Saudi Arabia & Waff - EP5
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia is in the process of becoming a powerful new actor on the global footballing scene.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Glorious - EP22
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we pay homage to glorious athletes.

programme.title: Football Nation - USA - EP2
programme.desc: The United States is one of the most perplexing football nations.

programme.title: Top 20 - Champions in Advertising 2014 - EP174
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible - Muhammad Ali - EP15
programme.desc: In 1974 and 1975, Muhammad Ali won two of the most emblematic heavyweight fights in boxing history, thus strengthening his status as the greatest athlete of all time.

programme.title: Foul Play - Tiger Woods - EP12
programme.desc: The liaisons, the addictions and the run-ins with the law. Tiger Woods and his tangles with justice.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP13
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London via JoBurg and meet @mrblockworkout, ex bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment!

programme.title: Flashpoint - Riner / Edwards / Marciano - EP35
programme.desc: Teddy Riner ends 10 years of invincibility in judo, Eddie "The Eagle" Edwards takes flight at the 1988 Calgary Games and Rocky Marciano turns his back on boxing.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Warriors - EP7
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we give pride of place to the athletes who have fought to win their place.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Individuals - EP8
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we look at the athletes who have taken their own paths.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Domination - EP9
programme.desc: This edition of Sportswoman is devoted to the athletes who have dominated their sport.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Triumphant - EP10
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, it’s about the women who have experienced triumphant success.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Venus Williams - EP11
programme.desc: Venus Williams evokes a life well lived and the tennis champions pay tribute to her.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Challengers - EP12
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, it’s about the athletes who have gone from the status of challengers to that of champions.

programme.title: Top 20 - Trash Talks - EP175
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible - Golden State Warriors - EP16
programme.desc: In 2015, the new dynasty of the NBA took form with the Golden State Warriors who carried off three titles in four seasons.

programme.title: Foul Play - Seoul 1988 Men's 100M - EP13
programme.desc: The final of the men's 100 metres in Seoul in 1988 was not just the dirtiest in history… it stained this emblematic race for years to come.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Brazil - EP14
programme.desc: Meet @mrblockworkout, ex-bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment! See @jcbarny, @SebastienFoucan, @SinguilaMusic and @Vanessalemoigne take up his challenges in Cergy in the Parisian region (France).

programme.title: Flashpoint - Durant / Neymar / Johnson - EP36
programme.desc: Kevin Durant and Lebron James, Neymar and FC Barcelona make fun of PSG and the man with the golden shoes of Atlanta 1996.

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage - Zidane - EP12
programme.desc: The incredible head of Zinedine Zidane.

programme.title: Foul Play - Eric Cantona - EP18
programme.desc: Eric Cantona of Manchester United sees red, France's Zinedine Zidane tackles the 2006 World Cup head on and the Uruguayan Luis Suarez takes a new mouthful in Brazil.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Riner / Edwards / Marciano - EP35
programme.desc: Teddy Riner ends 10 years of invincibility in judo, Eddie "The Eagle" Edwards takes flight at the 1988 Calgary Games and Rocky Marciano turns his back on boxing.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Redbull - EP3
programme.desc: We focus on the cutting-edge team of Grand Prix, Red Bull Racing.

programme.title: The Front Row - Driver Training - EP1
programme.desc: We explore the methods and training approaches used by Formula 1 drivers to prepare for an F1 season, notably Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen.

programme.title: The Iconic - Formula 1 - EP5
programme.desc: Ferrari is the best known F1 brand in the world, Lewis Hamilton is an icon of F1, just like the Monaco circuit, while Seb Vettel's year 2013 was a super season for F1.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hush Little Baby - EP16
programme.desc: Shhh it's nap time in Dee's room. Help Dee and Treble sing a lullaby to Teddy so he can get a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Dawkins Problem - EP105
programme.desc: Someone has hacked Dawkins, It's up to the Shaq Paq to figure out who the culprit is and set things right before it's too late.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep1 - EP1
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15
programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Pernicious Plan - EP212
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight a group trying to evade environmental laws.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Eggs and I - EP121
programme.desc: Bates and Dawkins give Himari a BIG surprise.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Burpin’ Babies / Backpack Payback - EP118
programme.desc: Kent’s youth serum works a little too well and turns the gang into screaming babies. The serum soon wears off – sort of – now they’re adults trapped in baby bodies and Von Bolt doesn’t know whether to obey or burp them. / When the Anti-Matters steal JD's backpack and discover the portable ALVA, they unwittingly cause Edison's hologram to disappear. The Secret Lab Kids must concoct a plan to retrieve the backpack before Edison's lost forever.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Consideration - EP122
programme.desc: In this episode we will understand that prudence is related to common sense and caution, to think about what you are going to say and when you can say it. Discretion is to behave in a way that does not offend anyone or reveal information. If you want to be discreet, you have to act with caution! You should think first of the consequences of your actions in order to make the best decisions.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Futile Attraction / Skin Deep - EP119
programme.desc: When Kent gets zapped by an electro-magnetic coil, he becomes a living magnet and tries to use his newfound “magnetic personal” to impress a girl he likes. / The Secret Lab Kids give Von Bolt an upgrade complete with prosthetic skin and now, looking quite human, Von Bolt ends up a top model destined for runway greatness.
